name: koharu
description: ML-powered manga translator, written in Rust.
readme_summary: Koharu is a Rust-based desktop application that automates the process of translating manga. It leverages machine learning models for text detection, OCR, inpainting to remove original text, and translation via LLMs, all running locally for privacy. The application supports advanced text rendering and offers features like layered PSD export for further editing.
key_features: Automatic detection of text regions, speech bubbles, and cleanup masks
OCR for manga dialogue, captions, and other page text
Inpainting to remove source lettering from the page
Translation with local or remote LLM backends
Advanced text rendering with vertical CJK and RTL support
Codex image-to-image generation for end-to-end page redraws
Layered PSD export with editable text
Local HTTP API and MCP server for automation
primary_use_case: Automated, local-first manga translation with ML-powered features and editable export options.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, depicted as a whimsical robot, meticulously transforming a black and white manga page into a vibrant, translated version. The robot uses a magical brush to erase original Japanese text, which dissipates into digital dust, and then precisely paints in new English dialogue bubbles that glow with translated meaning. On a nearby workbench, a tablet displays the Koharu UI with detected text boxes and translation options, while small, glowing code snippets float around the scene. The overall mood is one of creative automation and digital artistry, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a bright, inviting color palette.

name: systeminformer
description: A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ https://windows-internals.com
readme_summary: System Informer is a free, open-source Windows utility for monitoring system resources, debugging software, and detecting malware. It provides detailed insights into system activity, process management, network connections, and file usage, offering a more advanced alternative to the default Task Manager.
key_features: Detailed system activity overview with highlighting
Resource hog and runaway process tracking via graphs and statistics
Small, portable, and no installation required
primary_use_case: Advanced system monitoring, process management, and debugging on Windows.
cover_image_prompt: A highly detailed, intricate clockwork mechanism representing the inner workings of a computer system. A skilled artisan, holding a magnifying glass and a set of fine tools (subtly resembling code snippets), is meticulously adjusting gears and springs. Some gears glow with warning lights (representing problematic processes), while others pulse with steady energy (representing healthy system functions). Small, transparent data streams flow between components, visualized as glowing lines. The artisan's workbench has a small, clean UI displaying System Informer's logo and a simplified graph. The overall scene is set in a well-lit, organized workshop, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and precision.

name: FadCam
description: Open-source, ad-free Android multimedia recorder with background video recording, screen recording, live streaming, and remote camera control
readme_summary: FadCam is an open-source, ad-free Android application designed for multimedia recording. It offers advanced features such as background video recording, screen recording, live streaming capabilities, and remote camera control, all while prioritizing user privacy.
primary_use_case: To provide users with a versatile and privacy-conscious multimedia recording tool for Android devices, enabling various recording scenarios from background surveillance to screen capture and live broadcasts.
cover_image_prompt: A split-screen view of an Android phone. On one side, a user is interacting with a clean, minimalist app interface labeled 'FadCam', initiating a recording. On the other side, a subtle, almost invisible overlay shows a video feed being captured in the background, perhaps with a small, discreet icon indicating background operation. In a corner, a small, stylized icon of a streaming signal emanates from the phone, and another icon shows a remote control. The overall aesthetic is sleek and modern, with a focus on privacy and unobtrusive functionality. The background is a soft, abstract digital pattern, emphasizing the 'privacy-focused' aspect. The 'FadCam' logo is subtly integrated into the app interface. Style: 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a cool color palette.

name: openhuman
description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
readme_summary: OpenHuman is a personal AI superintelligence designed for private, local use. It aims to be simple yet powerful, acting as an AI harness that prioritizes user control and local memory.
primary_use_case: To provide users with a private, locally-run AI assistant that can manage tasks and information without relying on external cloud services for core functions.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, friendly robot with a glowing core, sitting at a desk in a cozy, personal study. The robot is holding a small, intricate gear (representing local memory) in one hand, and with the other, it's projecting a holographic interface displaying organized data streams and task lists. Subtle digital particles flow from the robot towards a small, stylized cloud icon in the corner, indicating managed services integration. The overall mood is one of quiet competence and personal assistance. The scene should be rendered in a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration style, with the repository name 'OpenHuman' subtly integrated into a book on the desk.

name: react-doctor
description: Your agent writes bad React. This catches it
readme_summary: React Doctor is a tool that deterministically scans React codebases to identify issues related to state and effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility. It works across various React frameworks and libraries and can be integrated into development workflows via CLI, CI, or coding agents.
key_features: Deterministic code scanning for React issues
Covers state & effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility
Works with all React frameworks and libraries (Next.js, Vite, React Native, etc.)
Installable skill for coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
primary_use_case: Automated code review and quality assurance for React applications, identifying potential bugs and bad practices before they become major issues.
cover_image_prompt: A meticulous, friendly robot doctor wearing a stethoscope made of code brackets is examining a tangled mess of wires representing a React application. The robot is holding a magnifying glass that reveals glowing 'X' marks on faulty connections and inefficient loops within the wires. On a nearby screen, a clean, organized network diagram is being generated from the messy input. The scene is set in a bright, modern workshop with subtle UI elements showing code snippets and performance metrics. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, vibrant color palette, emphasizing clarity and precision.
